title: Robotnik Receives An Unexpected Rescue(Tennis)
description:
Upon losing all of his fuel in his trip to Alpha Centauri, Robotnik is stranded without food for days before another mysterious space craft comes his way.  He sends out an S.O.S. asking that the other freighter rescue him.  They pick him up, along with his rocket ship, and Robotnik is grateful.

MY ROUND 3 BARGES INTO THE TENNIS WITH THECHAIRMAN45 & LIEUTENANTGWO
